market_regime.description: Normal volatility - standard setups work well

reasons: VIX regime stable — good for weekly holds
COT extreme_long — strong contrarian signal available

entry.instruction: Enter Monday morning. Wait 15-20 min after open for spread to tighten. Limit order at mid (8.11) or better. Skip if gap > 2%.

exit.instruction: Time-decay-aware exits: take 40% day-1 / 35% day-2 / 25% day-3 / 15% day-4 profit. Hard stop at 50% loss. Exit if delta < 0.10. Breakeven requires -0.0% move to $103.11 (weekly expected move: 5.0%).
